name: FNF: Pico VS Tankman
description: It's Pico and Tankman from Week "3" and Week "7" from Friday Night Funkin Pico and Tankman! Go crazy with his beeps and bops! Play on the web here on a PC/Mobile devices! If you want, if you have a windows computer, you can also download it with the download button below!
instructions: To switch to touch control touch the toggle in game Arrow keys to play the sounds For mobile press D-pad button Hold Space and arrow keys for secondary sound Hope you like it Hold any of the buttons to hold a pose
